claim: No Stable, release, conformance, complete manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Native-first Card structure with labelled state and logical DOM order.
semantics.rolePolicy: Owned roles and relationships remain present in the default mode; optional enhancement output is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through native interactive descendants in document order.
Where the component owns composite navigation, moves within the documented logical model.

nonColor: Text, native state, structure, symbols, or explicit labels accompany every green or violet signal.
responsive: Logical properties, intrinsic sizing, wrapping, and scoped overflow preserve use on narrow screens; manual evidence remains incomplete.
consumerResponsibilities: Preserve native elements, labels, relationships, logical order, and documented state when composing or styling.
Localize visible and spoken strings and retest long content, RTL, zoom, touch, forced colors, and assistive technology.
Do not claim Stable or complete conformance until every promotion delta has current evidence.
